description: Sequences module execution, coordinates artifact handoffs between modules, and enforces the canonical workflow order. The pipeline is the runtime backbone of the platform's golden paths.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Running domain-specific logic — that belongs to the relevant domain_module or workflow_module
Defining evaluation result schemas — those are owned by control_plane.evaluation
Managing work item lifecycle — that belongs to control_plane.work_items
Storing governance records — those are managed by the control_plane governance module
